prospectus.mission: Predicts cyberattack patterns using threat intelligence and historical attack data.
prospectus.target_users: CISOs, threat intelligence teams, SOC directors
limitations: This profile has an executable governed runtime instance backed by shared hardened code, not a separate always-running operating-system process.
External APIs require owner configuration, provider terms, sandbox tests, and scoped approval.
Published pricing and revenue models are catalog plans, not evidence of sales or earnings.

data_contract.storage_policy: store useful project artifacts only; raw credentials are forbidden; raw biometric media remains local or in an encrypted owner vault
data_contract.retention: owner-configurable with deletion and revocation support

approvals.contact_requirement: verified user-owned destination and explicit channel opt-in
approvals.execution_rule: approval authorizes one scoped action; it never exposes credentials to the bot or browser

sandbox.release_gate: all applicable checks pass and owner approves any live action

readiness.production_gate: implement or configure adapters, pass sandbox checks, add authentication, and verify deployment telemetry
